---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<div class="topbar">
  <h1 class="page-title">Firefox-Homepage</h1>
  <div class="size-controls">
    <span>Kartengröße</span>
    <button onclick="adjustSize(-20)" title="Kleiner (Breite & Höhe)">−</button>
    <button onclick="adjustSize(20)"  title="Größer (Breite & Höhe)">＋</button>
    <div class="gear-wrapper">
      <button class="gear-btn" id="gear-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleGear(event)" title="Einstellungen">⚙</button>
      <div class="gear-panel" id="gear-panel">

        <div class="gear-section-title">Breite &amp; Höhe</div>
        <div class="gear-row">
          <label>Breite</label>
          <button onclick="adjustWidth(-20)">−</button>
          <span class="gear-val" id="gear-width-val">160px</span>
          <button onclick="adjustWidth(20)">＋</button>
        </div>
        <div class="gear-row">
          <label>Höhe</label>
          <button onclick="adjustHeight(-20)">−</button>
          <span class="gear-val" id="gear-height-val">140px</span>
          <button onclick="adjustHeight(20)">＋</button>
        </div>

        <hr class="gear-divider">
        <div class="gear-section-title">Verhalten</div>
        <div class="gear-row">
          <label style="min-width:unset;flex:1">Neuer Tab</label>
          <label class="gear-toggle">
            <input type="checkbox" id="gear-new-tab" onchange="setNewTab(this.checked)">
            <span class="gear-toggle-slider"></span>
          </label>
        </div>

        <hr class="gear-divider">
        <div class="gear-section-title">Karte hinzufügen</div>
        <select id="gear-section">
          <option value="grid-de">Deutsch</option>
          <option value="grid-en">English</option>
          <option value="grid-sci">Wissenschaft</option>
          <option value="grid-did">Didaktik</option>
        </select>
        <input id="gear-name" type="text" placeholder="Name">
        <input id="gear-url"  type="text" placeholder="URL (z. B. example.com)">
        <input id="gear-desc" type="text" placeholder="Beschreibung (optional)">
        <button class="gear-btn-full" onclick="addCard()">＋ Hinzufügen</button>

        <hr class="gear-divider">
        <button class="gear-btn-full" id="delete-mode-btn" onclick="toggleDeleteMode()">🗑 Karten löschen</button>

      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<form class="search-bar" id="ddg-form">
  <input type="text" id="ddg-input" placeholder="DuckDuckGo durchsuchen …" autocomplete="off" autofocus>
  <button type="submit">↵</button>
</form>
<script>
document.getElementById('ddg-form').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  var q = document.getElementById('ddg-input').value.trim();
  if (q) window.location.href = 'https://duckduckgo.com/?q=' + encodeURIComponent(q);
});
</script>

<!-- ══ DEUTSCH ══ -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('grid-de')">
    <span class="section-label">Deutsch</span>
    <button class="toggle-btn" id="btn-grid-de">▾</button>
  </div>
  <div class="news-grid" id="grid-de">
    <a class="news-card" data-id="tagesschau" href="https://www.tagesschau.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=tagesschau.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Tagesschau</span>
      <span class="desc">Öffentlich-rechtliche Nachrichten</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="zeit" href="https://www.zeit.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=zeit.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">ZEIT Online</span>
      <span class="desc">Qualitätspresse & Hintergründe</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="taz" href="https://www.taz.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=taz.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">taz</span>
      <span class="desc">Unabhängige linke Tageszeitung</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="heise" href="https://www.heise.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=heise.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Heise Online</span>
      <span class="desc">IT, Tech & Wissenschaft</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="spiegel" href="https://www.spiegel.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=spiegel.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Der Spiegel</span>
      <span class="desc">Nachrichten & Investigativjournalismus</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ ENGLISH ══ -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('grid-en')">
    <span class="section-label">English</span>
    <button class="toggle-btn" id="btn-grid-en">▾</button>
  </div>
  <div class="news-grid" id="grid-en">
    <a class="news-card" data-id="guardian" href="https://www.theguardian.com">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=theguardian.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">The Guardian</span>
      <span class="desc">Progressive British journalism</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="bbc" href="https://www.bbc.com/news">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=bbc.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">BBC News</span>
      <span class="desc">International public broadcaster</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="nyt" href="https://www.nytimes.com">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=nytimes.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">New York Times</span>
      <span class="desc">U.S. newspaper of record</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="atlantic" href="https://www.theatlantic.com">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=theatlantic.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">The Atlantic</span>
      <span class="desc">Ideas, politics & culture</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="ars" href="https://arstechnica.com">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=arstechnica.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Ars Technica</span>
      <span class="desc">Tech, science & policy</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ WISSENSCHAFT ══ -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('grid-sci')">
    <span class="section-label">Wissenschaft</span>
    <button class="toggle-btn" id="btn-grid-sci">▾</button>
  </div>
  <div class="news-grid" id="grid-sci">
    <a class="news-card" data-id="nature" href="https://www.nature.com/news">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=nature.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Nature</span>
      <span class="desc">Multidisciplinary science journal</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="science" href="https://www.science.org/news">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=science.org&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Science</span>
      <span class="desc">AAAS flagship journal</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="quanta" href="https://www.quantamagazine.org">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=quantamagazine.org&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Quanta Magazine</span>
      <span class="desc">Math, physics & biology in depth</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="sciam" href="https://www.scientificamerican.com">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=scientificamerican.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Sci. American</span>
      <span class="desc">Popular science since 1845</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="spektrum" href="https://www.spektrum.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=spektrum.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Spektrum</span>
      <span class="desc">Wissenschaft auf Deutsch</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ DIDAKTIK ══ -->
<div class="section">
  <div class="section-header" onclick="toggleSection('grid-did')">
    <span class="section-label">Mathematik- & Philosophiedidaktik</span>
    <button class="toggle-btn" id="btn-grid-did">▾</button>
  </div>
  <div class="news-grid" id="grid-did">
    <a class="news-card" data-id="zdm" href="https://link.springer.com/journal/11858">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=springer.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">ZDM</span>
      <span class="desc">Zeitschrift für Didaktik der Mathematik</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="jmd" href="https://link.springer.com/journal/13138">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=springer.com&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">JMD</span>
      <span class="desc">Journal für Mathematik-Didaktik</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="mu" href="https://www.mathematik-unterricht.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=mathematik-unterricht.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Der Mathematik&shy;unterricht</span>
      <span class="desc">Praxiszeitschrift für den MU</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="zdpe" href="https://www.zdpe.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=zdpe.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">ZDPE</span>
      <span class="desc">Didaktik der Philosophie & Ethik</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="ethik" href="https://www.ethik-und-unterricht.de">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=ethik-und-unterricht.de&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Ethik & Unterricht</span>
      <span class="desc">Fachzeitschrift für den Ethikunterricht</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="sep" href="https://plato.stanford.edu">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=plato.stanford.edu&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">Stanford Encyclopedia</span>
      <span class="desc">Philosophie-Referenzwerk</span>
    </a>
    <a class="news-card" data-id="philpapers" href="https://philpapers.org">
      <img src="https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=philpapers.org&sz=64" alt="">
      <span class="name">PhilPapers</span>
      <span class="desc">Philosophie-Literaturdatenbank</span>
    </a>
  </div>
</div>

<script>
(function () {
  const GRIDS = ['grid-de', 'grid-en', 'grid-sci', 'grid-did'];

  // ── New-tab preference ──
  var newTab = localStorage.getItem('newTab') === 'true';

  function applyNewTab() {
    var target = newTab ? '_blank' : '';
    document.querySelectorAll('.news-card').forEach(function (c) { c.target = target; });
    var cb = document.getElementById('gear-new-tab');
    if (cb) cb.checked = newTab;
  }

  window.setNewTab = function (val) {
    newTab = val;
    localStorage.setItem('newTab', val);
    applyNewTab();
  };

  // ── Card size (migrate old 'cardSize' key) ──
  let cardWidth  = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('cardWidth')  || localStorage.getItem('cardSize') || '160');
  let cardHeight = parseInt(localStorage.getItem('cardHeight') || '140');

  applySize();
  updateGearDisplay();

  function applySize() {
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card-min-width', cardWidth  + 'px');
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--card-height',    cardHeight + 'px');
  }

  function updateGearDisplay() {
    var wEl = document.getElementById('gear-width-val');
    var hEl = document.getElementById('gear-height-val');
    if (wEl) wEl.textContent = cardWidth  + 'px';
    if (hEl) hEl.textContent = cardHeight + 'px';
  }

  // Both dimensions at once
  window.adjustSize = function (delta) {
    cardWidth  = Math.max(100, Math.min(320, cardWidth  + delta));
    cardHeight = Math.max(80,  Math.min(500, cardHeight + delta));
    localStorage.setItem('cardWidth',  cardWidth);
    localStorage.setItem('cardHeight', cardHeight);
    applySize();
    updateGearDisplay();
  };

  // Width only
  window.adjustWidth = function (delta) {
    cardWidth = Math.max(100, Math.min(320, cardWidth + delta));
    localStorage.setItem('cardWidth', cardWidth);
    applySize();
    updateGearDisplay();
  };

  // Height only
  window.adjustHeight = function (delta) {
    cardHeight = Math.max(80, Math.min(500, cardHeight + delta));
    localStorage.setItem('cardHeight', cardHeight);
    applySize();
    updateGearDisplay();
  };

  // ── Gear panel ──
  var gearOpen = false;

  window.toggleGear = function (e) {
    e.stopPropagation();
    gearOpen = !gearOpen;
    document.getElementById('gear-panel').classList.toggle('open', gearOpen);
    document.getElementById('gear-toggle-btn').classList.toggle('active', gearOpen);
  };

  document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
    if (gearOpen && !e.target.closest('.gear-wrapper')) {
      gearOpen = false;
      document.getElementById('gear-panel').classList.remove('open');
      document.getElementById('gear-toggle-btn').classList.remove('active');
    }
  });

  // ── Delete mode ──
  var deleteMode = false;

  window.toggleDeleteMode = function () {
    deleteMode = !deleteMode;
    document.body.classList.toggle('delete-mode-active', deleteMode);
    var btn = document.getElementById('delete-mode-btn');
    if (btn) {
      btn.textContent = deleteMode ? '✕ Abbrechen' : '🗑 Karten löschen';
      btn.classList.toggle('delete-active', deleteMode);
    }
  };

  function deleteCard(card, e) {
    e.preventDefault();
    e.stopPropagation();
    var id     = card.dataset.id;
    var gridId = card.dataset.grid;

    var customs   = getCustomCards();
    var customIdx = customs.findIndex(function (c) { return c.id === id; });
    if (customIdx !== -1) {
      customs.splice(customIdx, 1);
      saveCustomCards(customs);
    } else {
      var hidden = getHiddenCards();
      if (hidden.indexOf(id) === -1) { hidden.push(id); }
      saveHiddenCards(hidden);
    }

    card.remove();

    var grid = document.getElementById(gridId);
    if (grid) {
      var order = Array.from(grid.children).map(function (c) { return c.dataset.id; });
      localStorage.setItem('order-' + gridId, JSON.stringify(order));
    }
  }

  function getCustomCards() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('custom-cards') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }
  function saveCustomCards(arr) { localStorage.setItem('custom-cards', JSON.stringify(arr)); }

  function getHiddenCards() {
    try { return JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('hidden-cards') || '[]'); } catch (e) { return []; }
  }
  function saveHiddenCards(arr) { localStorage.setItem('hidden-cards', JSON.stringify(arr)); }

  // ── Hide deleted built-in cards ──
  getHiddenCards().forEach(function (id) {
    var card = document.querySelector('[data-id="' + id + '"]');
    if (card) card.remove();
  });

  // ── Build a card element ──
  function createCardElement(c) {
    var a = document.createElement('a');
    a.className = 'news-card';
    a.dataset.id   = c.id;
    a.dataset.grid = c.section;
    a.href         = c.url;
    a.target       = '_blank';

    var domain = '';
    try { domain = new URL(c.url).hostname; } catch (e2) {}

    var img = document.createElement('img');
    img.src = 'https://www.google.com/s2/favicons?domain=' + domain + '&sz=64';
    img.alt = '';
    a.appendChild(img);

    var nameEl = document.createElement('span');
    nameEl.className   = 'name';
    nameEl.textContent = c.name;
    a.appendChild(nameEl);

    if (c.desc) {
      var descEl = document.createElement('span');
      descEl.className   = 'desc';
      descEl.textContent = c.desc;
      a.appendChild(descEl);
    }

    addDeleteOverlay(a);
    return a;
  }

  function addDeleteOverlay(card) {
    var overlay = document.createElement('div');
    overlay.className = 'delete-overlay';
    var btn = document.createElement('button');
    btn.textContent = '✕';
    btn.addEventListener('click', function (e) { deleteCard(card, e); });
    overlay.appendChild(btn);
    card.appendChild(overlay);
  }

  // ── Load saved custom cards ──
  getCustomCards().forEach(function (c) {
    var grid = document.getElementById(c.section);
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.appendChild(createCardElement(c));
  });

  applyNewTab();

  // ── Add delete overlays to built-in cards ──
  GRIDS.forEach(function (gridId) {
    var grid = document.getElementById(gridId);
    if (!grid) return;
    grid.querySelectorAll('.news-card').forEach(function (card) {
      card.dataset.grid = gridId;
      addDeleteOverlay(card);
    });
  });

  // ── Add card from gear panel ──
  window.addCard = function () {
    var section = document.getElementById('gear-section').value;
    var name    = document.getElementById('gear-name').value.trim();
    var url     = document.getElementById('gear-url').value.trim();
    var desc    = document.getElementById('gear-desc').value.trim();
    if (!name || !url) return;

    if (!/^https?:\/\//i.test(url)) url = 'https://' + url;

    var id = 'custom-' + Date.now();
    var c  = { id: id, section: section, name: name, url: url, desc: desc };

    var grid = document.getElementById(section);
    if (!grid) return;

    var card = createCardElement(c);
    if (newTab) card.target = '_blank';
    grid.appendChild(card);
    initCardDrag(card);

    var customs = getCustomCards();
    customs.push(c);
    saveCustomCards(customs);

    var order = Array.from(grid.children).map(function (ch) { return ch.dataset.id; });
    localStorage.setItem('order-' + section, JSON.stringify(order));

    document.getElementById('gear-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('gear-url').value  = '';
    document.getElementById('gear-desc').value = '';
  };

  // ── Collapse / expand ──
  window.toggleSection = function (gridId) {
    var grid        = document.getElementById(gridId);
    var btn         = document.getElementById('btn-' + gridId);
    var isCollapsed = grid.classList.toggle('collapsed');
    btn.classList.toggle('collapsed', isCollapsed);
    localStorage.setItem('collapsed-' + gridId, isCollapsed);
  };

  GRIDS.forEach(function (id) {
    if (localStorage.getItem('collapsed-' + id) === 'true') {
      var grid = document.getElementById(id);
      var btn  = document.getElementById('btn-' + id);
      if (grid) grid.classList.add('collapsed');
      if (btn)  btn.classList.add('collapsed');
    }
  });

  // ── Drag & drop ──
  var dragSrc = null;

  function initCardDrag(card) {
    card.draggable = true;

    card.addEventListener('dragstart', function (e) {
      dragSrc = this;
      this.classList.add('dragging');
      e.dataTransfer.effectAllowed = 'move';
      e.dataTransfer.setData('text/plain', this.dataset.id);
    });

    card.addEventListener('dragend', function () {
      this.classList.remove('dragging');
      document.querySelectorAll('.news-card').forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove('drag-over'); });
    });

    card.addEventListener('dragover', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.dataTransfer.dropEffect = 'move';
      if (dragSrc && dragSrc !== this && dragSrc.parentNode === this.parentNode) {
        document.querySelectorAll('.news-card').forEach(function (c) { c.classList.remove('drag-over'); });
        this.classList.add('drag-over');
      }
    });

    card.addEventListener('drop', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();
      e.stopPropagation();
      this.classList.remove('drag-over');
      if (!dragSrc || dragSrc === this) return;
      if (dragSrc.parentNode !== this.parentNode) return;

      var parent = this.parentNode;
      var cards  = Array.from(parent.children);
      var srcIdx = cards.indexOf(dragSrc);
      var tgtIdx = cards.indexOf(this);

      if (srcIdx < tgtIdx) {
        parent.insertBefore(dragSrc, this.nextSibling);
      } else {
        parent.insertBefore(dragSrc, this);
      }

      var order = Array.from(parent.children).map(function (c) { return c.dataset.id; });
      localStorage.setItem('order-' + parent.id, JSON.stringify(order));
    });

    card.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      if (deleteMode) { e.preventDefault(); return; }
      if (dragSrc)    { e.preventDefault(); dragSrc = null; }
    });
  }

  function initDrag(grid) {
    var saved = localStorage.getItem('order-' + grid.id);
    if (saved) {
      try {
        JSON.parse(saved).forEach(function (id) {
          var card = grid.querySelector('[data-id="' + id + '"]');
          if (card) grid.appendChild(card);
        });
      } catch (e) {}
    }
    grid.querySelectorAll('.news-card').forEach(function (card) { initCardDrag(card); });
  }

  GRIDS.forEach(function (id) {
    var grid = document.getElementById(id);
    if (grid) initDrag(grid);
  });
})();
</script>
```
